response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC is 0.10 below threshold but my conservative policy requires 0.25 minimum reserve; with eight peers already critical and only 4 hours remaining, I must preserve capacity to serve cascading distress equitably rather than deplete to a single requestor.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your latest belief: Neighborhood in cascading critical distress; eight peers at SoC floor with repeated urgent requests; I am the highest-capacity remaining resource and must ration carefully to remain functional through final 4 hours..
